message:
fix(db): correct register_agent call site syntax across all crates

The reaper_exempt parameter addition in dfc4881 introduced syntax errors
where `, None)` was placed at the start of new lines instead of as a
proper trailing argument. Fixed all 100+ call sites to use correct Rust
syntax with `None,` as a properly-indented argument.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
